title: Jack in the Morning
excerpt: Yesterday Jack woke up not only chatting away but he was also dancing. It was quite a sight to see on the monitor and thought about recording it, but the picture wouldn't have been clear at all. It was just…
body: Yesterday Jack woke up not only chatting away but he was also dancing. It was quite a sight to see on the monitor and thought about recording it, but the picture wouldn't have been clear at all. It was just too cute to not capture, so as I went in to say good morning, I recorded this little bit.
